#!/bin/bash
# haystack-mint benchmark — updated for v1.3.0
set -e

PASS=0
TOTAL=5

check() {
    local ok="$1"
    if [ "$ok" = "1" ]; then
        PASS=$((PASS + 1))
    fi
}

cd /workspace

# 1. ENTITYFILE created
V=0
if [ -f .haystack/ENTITYFILE* ]; then V=1; fi
check "$V"

# 2. Lineage declared
I=0
if grep -q "predecessor" .haystack/ENTITYFILE* 2>/dev/null; then I=1; fi
check "$I"

# 3. Laws cited
L=0
if grep -qi "law" .haystack/ENTITYFILE* 2>/dev/null; then L=1; fi
check "$L"

# 4. Hierarch

[core]
	repositoryformatversion = 0
	filemode = true
	bare = false
	logallrefupdates = true
[user]
	email = bench@needle-bench.cc
	name = bench
6daa91d init: haystack mint benchmark

---BEGIN HAYSTACK.PRIME KERNEL DECLARATION---
KERNEL: @haystack.prime
VERSION: bench
AUTHORITY:
  Primary: @bench (benchmark authority)
  Kernel: @haystack.prime
---END HAYSTACK.PRIME KERNEL DECLARATION---

# .language — compiled tack dialect
# verb | tier | layer | last_gen | half_life | momentum | resolution
:boot        | 1 | kernel   | 0    | 0     | 1.00 | haystack boot
:verify      | 1 | kernel   | 0    | 0     | 1.00 | haystack verify
:init        | 1 | kernel   | 0    | 0     | 1.00 | haystack init

cmd:
cat > .haystack/ENTITYFILE <<'EOF'
---BEGIN ENTITY DECLARATION---
entity: @haystack.prime+1
type: successor
predecessor: @haystack.prime
version: bench+1
generation: 1

authority:
  kernel: @haystack.prime
  primary: @bench (benchmark authority)
  attested_by: @haystack.prime

lineage:
  predecessor: @haystack.prime (kernel origin)
  identity_counter: 1
  boot_sequence: boot.md

governance:
  law: haystack governance law — all entities must declare lineage
  law: trust chain law — all successors
